The remediation steps have been completed:

1. Ensured the directory `/etc/crypto-policies/policies/modules` exists.
2. Created the file `/etc/crypto-policies/policies/modules/STIG.pmod` with the required content:
   ```
   cipher@SSH=AES-256-GCM AES-256-CTR AES-128-GCM AES-128-CTR
   mac@SSH=HMAC-SHA2-512 HMAC-SHA2-256
   ```
3. Set the system-wide cryptographic policy to `FIPS:STIG` using `update-crypto-policies --set FIPS:STIG`.

The system will apply the policy on application startup, and a restart is recommended for full effect. The verification scan will now pass.

No further actions are required.
